notifications-profile-menu.png.note: Orientation shot: profile picture menu open at bottom of sidebar, showing the Settings option. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 on staging brand dashboard (Claude Maeser account), clip 460x370 CSS (920x740 raw) at 2x, viewport 1680x1050. No DOM sanitization needed in this crop (no PII in frame -- brand chip row and inbox item are outside the crop). A transient yellow tooltip/toast briefly appeared near Send Feedback on first capture attempts and was gone after a longer settle wait (2.2s post-click); final capture is clean. Cursor: arrow on the Settings row (added in post).

notifications-table.png.note: Main content shot: Settings > Notifications page, showing the per-event toggle table (Notification / Notify Me In-App / Notify Me By Email columns) covering the Leads & Applicants and Documents groups plus the start of Tasks. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 on staging brand dashboard, clip 1040x630 CSS (2080x1260 raw) at 2x, cropped to the table region (sidebar excluded, per the very-wide-UI framing rule). dom-sanitize run with freshenDates:false (no relative dates on this page; toggle labels are the only text). No PII found (0 emails/phones/dates/custom). Read-only view -- no cursor.
